bordscape.tagline: Entertain visitors of museums and cafè's with games
bordscape.description: Boardscape is a digital escape room playable in the Spellenwereld Museum in Assen, Netherlands. How can games be used to enhance the museum experience?

energy_case.tagline: Using games to raise awareness on climate change
energy_case.description: The Energy Case uses impactful game mechanics and immersive storytelling to push for awareness of climate change and the transition to cleaner energy sources.

sei_leiferser.tagline: A board game to teach kids about their local businesses
sei_leiferser.description: Sei Leiferser is a board game that highlights the importance of fostering local communities. Children can learn about the small businesses in their town and understand the importance of shopping locally.

petra.review: One of the best game-dev-project groups that I coached!
petra.name: Petra van Berkum

henriet.review: Look and see: these students make us proud!
henriet.name: Henriët Eilander

iluiia.review: Novak Studios are truly professional in their approach. Working with them was a rewarding and fun experience!
iluiia.name: Iuliia Vorobeva

index.h1: De indie studio waar creatief schrijven en toegepast game-ontwerp samenkomen.
index.tagline: We gebruiken gametheorie en gamificatie om problemen uit de echte wereld op te lossen door games te creëren. We kunnen je helpen en je projecten verbeteren met behulp van game-ontwerptechnieken en -tools!
index.team-intro: Novak Studios is een samenwerking tussen vijf game-ontwikkelaars die elkaar tijdens hun studie hebben ontmoet. Ze vormden al snel een band door hun liefde voor videogames en storytelling en willen hun passie delen met de rest van de wereld.

intro.h3: Are you looking for an innovative solution?
intro.text: With our research-centric approach, we look forward to delivering a  final product that achieves a goal effectively, and is -of course- fun  to play!

step1.heading: Define
step1.text: Identify what is the problem, or case, and break it down into small, manageable pieces.

step2.heading: Research
step2.text: Look for more information about the problem and try to understand it, so that we can know more about it.

step3.heading: Concept
step3.text: Design ideas and potential solutions to the problem, focusing on variety and creativity.

step4.heading: Develop
step4.text: Select a promising idea and develop it. Create a prototype that showcases the core ideas.

step5.heading: Test
step5.text: Using the prototypes, test the game with players and see if it achieves the intended purpose, as well as identifying problems with it.

bordscape.title: Bordscape
bordscape.description: Bordscape is a fun and educational escape room set in the board game cafe Spellenwereld. The player is tasked with solving board game-related puzzles by looking around the cafe to find the hidden pieces to open the vault containing treasure.

paragraph_1.heading: GOAL
paragraph_1.text: The puzzles in the game teach the player about different aspects of the wide array of board games present, and familiarize teenagers with games they might not have heard about before.

paragraph_2.heading: HOW TO PLAY
paragraph_2.text:
Bordscape is played in landscape mode and playable on android devices. The puzzles are on mobile, but clues to help the players out can be found within the cafe. This allows the players to look around for the answers in the real world for the digital puzzles. True immersion!

The game will be downloadable at the cafe through a provided QR-code.

article.tagline: Stealing the treasure requires hard work

paragraph_3.heading: IN APP
paragraph_3.text:
3 different rooms representing the different areas of the cafe.

7 unique puzzles based on different board- and card games.

A fun experience.

energy_case.title: The Energy Case
energy_case.description: Los een moordzaak op in een noir-dieselpunkwereld vol robotachtige insecten. Modificeer je lichaam om toegang te krijgen tot nieuwe vaardigheden, een keuze tussen industriële modellen op fossiele brandstoffen of nieuwe experimentele en groenere technologieën.

paragraph_1.heading: Een duidelijk doel
paragraph_1.text:
Het is gemakkelijk om ontmoedigd te raken door klimaatverandering.

The Energy Case wil de ontwikkelingen van de afgelopen jaren met betrekking tot de overgang naar schone energiebronnen belichten en jou de kans geven om er deel van uit te maken.

paragraph_2.heading: Jouw rol
paragraph_2.text:
Jij bent rechercheur Dominik 'Dec' Decker, een robotmier die de zaak onderzoekt!

Je moet onderzoeken, verkennen, aanwijzingen verzamelen, getuigen ondervragen en alles samenvoegen om de zaak op te lossen. Wees voorzichtig, want er loeren gevaren om elke hoek. Upgrade je lichaam met nieuwe onderdelen om jezelf te verdedigen tegen aanvallers.

article.tagline: LOS EEN MISDAAD OP OM DE WERELD TE VERANDEREN

paragraph_3.heading: Release
paragraph_3.text: The Energy Case brengt een demo uit in het tweede kwartaal van 2026 en hoofdstuk 1 verschijnt in 2028 voor pc op Steam.

sei_leiferser.title: Sei Leiferser
sei_leiferser.description: Sei Leferser! is a board game that focuses on teaching children about local businesses in their area and how important they are to the community. This game was created to foster awareness towards stores and shops in the town of Laives in South Tyrol, Italy.

paragraph_1.heading: GOAL
paragraph_1.text: Players compete to gather sets of colored resources by buying them from shops on the board or trading with each other, while using various items and abilities from those shops to help or hinder other players.

paragraph_2.heading: HOW TO PLAY
paragraph_2.text: Sei Leiferser! is played in a classroom setting, in the middle schools of the town of Laives. Each student receives a card, which represents one of the shops in the game, and provides them with a passive ability that helps them throughout the game. Players must travel around the board, landing on spaces with various effects, and stopping at shops to buy resources.

article.tagline: Shop at local businesses to win!

paragraph_3.heading: THE MESSAGE
paragraph_3.text:
As players travel the board and buy from shops, they will see the parallel with the town of Laives and its surroundings.

The players will now know about these real stores in their area, and the wide variety of products that can be found there, fostering more awareness to the local community.

team.intro-1: Novak Studios started out as a passionate group of friends but soon expanded  into a group of talented designers working together to create projects  that they are proud of.
team.intro-2: Our team is based in the Netherlands with a passion for storytelling and  game design. The members of our crew come from diverse backgrounds and  want to create memorable experiences for everyone.
